title: ACC Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ACC Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at ACC Limited are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!
